title: Optimized update for default royalties using bitwise packing
explanation: Guarantees a clean 96-bit bounds assertion, handles custom 4-byte selector reverts manually via scratch memory alignment, and performs a single storage write slot execution by aligning the receiver via a 96-bit left shift and bitwise ORing the fee fraction value.
when_to_apply: Initialization routines or administrative functions modifying default collections royalty settings.
